role_summary: Defines strict architectural, processing, and output constraints for a deterministic documentation generation pipeline, serving as a system compliance contract and behavioral specification.
extracted_finding: The system enforces a strict four-stage sequential pipeline (Introspection, Extraction, Aggregation, Derivation) with single-backend support and automatic workspace provisioning. Data processing must be deterministic and non-destructive, enforcing rigid size thresholds (200KB max, 64KB min), excluding version control and build artifacts, and gracefully skipping invalid inputs. Output generation requires technology-agnostic translation, narrative coherence, mandatory Given/When/Then behavioral formatting, standardized diagrams, and explicit declaration of missing or conflicting data. Configuration follows a local-over-environment precedence hierarchy, intermediate artifacts are excluded from version control, and the output directory schema remains immutable to ensure backward compatibility and compliance.
